news.summary: Donald Trump has filed his mandatory annual financial disclosure. The report shows the US President made more than 1.4 billion dollars via cryptocurrency ventures last year. That figure represents the overwhelming majority of Trump's personal earnings - a massive sum that has been made possible in l

news.headline: PlayStation to phase out physical disc production for consoles from January 2028
news.summary:
<p>Sony on Wednesday announced that PlayStation will end physical disc production for games on its consoles from January 2028.</p>

news.headline: Sudan’s RSF committed ethnic cleansing, says Amnesty
news.summary:
The Sudanese paramilitary Rapid Support Forces (RSF) committed crimes against humanity and ethnic cleansing during their attack on El-Fasher city between 2024 and 2025, Amnesty International alleged Wednesday.
Sudan has been mired since April 2023 in a brutal war between the army and the RSF, which
